Subscription Plan

Free

Starter plan for new vendors

  • WhatsApp purchase link
  • 10 products max
  • 1 image per product
  • Basic support

Basic (₦3,000)

For growing vendors

  • WhatsApp purchase link
  • Payment gateway (Online Payment)
  • Unlimited Products
  • Up to 5 images per product
  • Standard support

Brand Logo

Social Media Connect

Bank / Payment Details

Your payment information is stored securely and used for receiving payouts.


Account Security

Protect your Linko account by using a strong password and keeping your login details confidential. For your safety, you may be required to confirm your current password before making sensitive changes.

Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)

Add an extra layer of security to your Linko account. When enabled, you’ll be required to enter a one-time verification code during login.

Status: Disabled
